x-enumeration-literals.name: Real-Time Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Payments are executed and settled instantly when initiated.

Comment:
Example: Debit card purchase at a store or instant mobile wallet transfer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
ayments are initiated on a specified future date rather than immediately.

Comment:
Example: Pre-scheduled utility bill or loan repayment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standing Order Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Payments that repeat automatically at regular intervals according to a predefined schedule.

Comment:
Example: Monthly subscription fees or rent payments debited automatically.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Batch Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Multiple payments are grouped and processed together at specific intervals.

Comment:
Example: Payroll debits or bulk vendor payments processed overnight.

x-enumeration-literals.name: P2P Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Payment Modality: Payments directly transferred between individuals using debit accounts, often via apps or online banking.

Comment:
Example: Sending money to a friend via a banking app using your debit account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: POS Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Point-of-Sale (POS) Payment Modality: Payments made in-person using a debit card at a merchant location.

Comment:
Example: Swipe, tap, or insert debit card for in-store purchase.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Automated Clearing House (ACH) / Direct Debit Modality  Payments initiated electronically via authorization to pull funds from the debit account.

Comment:
Example: Direct debit for utility bills or insurance premiums.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Exception / Conditional Payment Modality: Payments executed under special conditions or with modifications to standard rules.

Comment:
Example: Fee-waived payments during promotions or emergency fund transfers with priority processing.
